Variable Name: calf_feeds or growing_feeds or close_up_feeds or lac_cow_feeds
Definition: Each section is comprised of a list of feeds (RuFaS Feed IDs)
For each feed ID< amount of a ration that is a given feed (percentage)
Allowable +/- percentage variance in each of the defined ration inclusion percentage values (fraction)
Allowable amount of milk reduction (kg) when dietary nutrient supply cannot meet animal requirements
